sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of 'được' (can/be allowed to) does not significantly change the meaning of the sentence in this context; it only adds a nuance of permission or possibility, but the main intent remains the same.

Substituting 'thế chấp' (mortgage/pledge) with 'khai thác' (exploit/extract) changes the meaning of the sentence significantly, as it refers to a completely different financial action regarding the asset.
